objective: Implement PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY Phase 5 framework topology detection for React static API calls, Next.js API routes, service routing edges, webhook recognition, and regression tests

evaluator.command: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when TypeScript check, tests proving React fetch to API route topology, API route to service edge, webhook route recognition, context topology evidence, trace_flow framework edges, and production build pass

lastValidation.evidence: Implemented Phase 5 framework topology detection: expanded EdgeKind with framework topology kinds; added framework pass that detects Next.js API routes, static React/client fetch('/api/...') calls, route-to-service edges from resolved call graph, and webhook routes; chunking appends framework edges after import/LSP resolution; traceFlow and ContextPack topology include calls_api/routes_to/handles_webhook. Regression tests cover React fetch to API route, API route to service, webhook recognition, trace_flow framework edges, and ContextPack topology evidence. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
